CustomField.formula:
IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c),
HYPERLINK(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id ,IMAGE(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c) - 1))),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c)))))),
IMAGE("https://fimby.file.force.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_PNG&versionId=068OL00000A728z&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOL00000CsvCQ&page=0&d=/a/OL000005rMIr/8p5CUUyFrdpAivDzkgUrn4DaBoudxfTwT4yVSF5lRSc&oid=00D5f000006NDkr", "",100, 100))
CustomField.label: Photo
